title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Iran begins mourning for late leader
slides.explanation: Mourners are gathering in Tehran for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The late Supreme Leader and his family members were killed during the ongoing war.

slides.headline: Trump questions US support for NATO
slides.explanation: Donald Trump says the current US relationship with NATO is one-sided. He criticized the alliance ahead of an upcoming summit in Ankara.

slides.headline: Chess legend suspended over cheating claims
slides.explanation: The international chess federation has suspended former world champion Vladimir Kramnik. He was penalized after accusing another player of cheating.

slides.headline: Third teen charged in Melbourne stabbing
slides.explanation: Police have charged a third teenager following the death of a 15-year-old boy. The victim was found critically wounded outside a hospital in Melbourne.

slides.headline: Bus crash in Pakistan kills at least 32
slides.explanation: A bus travelling through Pakistan's Dana Sar mountains plunged into a ravine. Authorities confirmed at least 32 people died in the crash.

caption: Here are the top stories you need to know today. From international politics to major breaking news, we are keeping you updated on what matters. Check out the latest headlines in the Headlinne app. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: Jon Prosser fights back against Apple
slides.explanation: YouTuber Jon Prosser has officially responded to a lawsuit from Apple regarding leaked iOS secrets. He denies being part of any scheme to hurt the company.

slides.headline: The Verge picks their summer trends
slides.explanation: The team at The Verge has released their latest list of what is in and out for this summer. It is their annual take on changing trends in the tech world.

slides.headline: Tech helps save a historic warship
slides.explanation: A team in Sweden is using new technology to help preserve an old warship. It is a fascinating look at how modern tools protect history.

slides.headline: Gadget prices are climbing higher
slides.explanation: Phones and computers are getting more expensive. A shortage of AI chips is driving up costs for all kinds of tech gear.

slides.headline: Meta launches an AI game maker
slides.explanation: Meta has released a new app called Pocket that lets users create generative AI games. Right now, it seems unavailable in the US.

caption: From rising tech prices to new ways to build games, here is what you need to know today. We are breaking down the latest updates in the industry so you can stay in the loop. Swipe through for the highlights. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
